ValidationRule.description: MIS-2092 When a user modifies a ddq request and has the title of Information Security Director or General Counsel the Complexity field will be mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( ISBLANK( text(Complexity__c) ) , not (isnew()), OR ( $User.Title ="General Counsel",$User.Title ="Information Security Director"), RecordType.DeveloperName ="Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'In Process') )
